title: orchis × tingitania
intro: Orchis × tingitania is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between the Orchis italica and Orchis mascula, two species of orchids native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orchis × tingitania include its ability to treat various ailments such as respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Orchis × tingitania is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder for topical applications.
